'''Loretto''' was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the famed artist, [[Duos'tine]].

==Appearances==
*[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 6|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 6]] {{Mo}}
